shortestpath.004: The default cursor tool for preview.
shortestpath.005: The default zoom level for preview. Allowed values are `auto`, `page-actual`, `page-fit`, `page-width`, and 1-based scale values. (`1.0` means 100%)
shortestpath.006: Show the sidebar on load. The default visibility of sidebar for preview.
shortestpath.007: The default scroll mode for preview.
shortestpath.008: The default spread mode for preview.
